base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of full_map_composites — a tile from 1994 super metroid. Full-canvas composite maps per region — auto-map-data-derived blueprints. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Full-canvas composite maps per region — auto-map-data-derived blueprints
